description:
A libre server and cloud storage browser for Mac and Windows with support for FTP, SFTP, WebDAV, Amazon S3, OpenStack Swift, Backblaze B2, Microsoft Azure & OneDrive, Google Drive and Dropbox.


- [Bugfix] Use regular dual-stack endpoints for presigned URLs (S3)
- [Bugfix] No attempt to use SSH agent for authentication (SFTP) (Windows)
- [Bugfix] Share menu item not enabled (OneDrive, SharePoint) (#17082)
